summary: Observed light seal weep at drive end; recommend monitor during next route.

Noted fouling trend from outlet temperature rise; forward to process engineer.

Valve torque higher than normal; keep on watch list for July shutdown.
Verified nozzles clear and level indicator leg free of blockage.
Performed coupling alignment check after minor baseplate adjustment.
